content:
type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) helper; image_to_base64 now calls it before guessing mimetype and no longer calls b64encode directly. Working in isolated workspace so no on-disk conflict, but flagging since both touch image_to_base64 body.
